toolConfig.name: Date Calculator
toolConfig.shortDesc: Add or subtract days, weeks, months, and years from a given date
toolConfig.longDesc: Date Calculator helps you calculate new dates by adding or subtracting years, months, weeks, and days from a start date. Perfect for planning events, calculating deadlines, or finding past dates.
toolConfig.seoTitle: Date Calculator - Add or Subtract Days, Weeks, Months, Years
toolConfig.seoDescription: Free online date calculator. Add or subtract years, months, weeks, and days from any date. Quick and easy to use.

pageProps.seoTitle: Date Calculator - Add or Subtract Days, Weeks, Months, Years
pageProps.seoDescription: Free online date calculator. Add or subtract years, months, weeks, and days from any date. Quick and easy to use.

toolStrings.generateNote: Note: Generates a literal pattern that matches the exact text (special characters escaped).
toolStrings.enterSampleTextDesc: Paste example text to generate a literal regex pattern
